pros: Stamen and custom styles look beautiful
Affordable alternative to Mapbox at scale
cons: Smaller team and infrastructure vs Mapbox
review.verdict: Great Mapbox alternative for display-first map needs; less complete if you also need full routing stack.
review.best_for: Developers needing clean styled maps without Mapbox prices
review.not_for: Apps that rely on turn-by-turn navigation and traffic
